tools.name: Achievement Roadmap
tools.desc: All achievements sorted by tier (bronze / silver / gold). Unlock conditions and rarity.

tools.name: Affix Interaction Matrix
tools.desc: Visualizes how prefix/suffix affixes stack across slots. Heatmap of compatible combinations.

tools.name: AI Content Generator
tools.desc: Generate dialogs, lore, and item names through the AI pipeline. Prompts driven by templates.

tools.name: All Tools (Index)
tools.desc: This page. Live index of every tool, catalog, and admin page.

tools.name: Asset Pipeline Trace
tools.desc: Trace each generated image through SpriteCook → review → approval → live. Used to debug pipeline drift.

tools.name: Audio Library
tools.desc: (no description — add one in tools-meta.json)

tools.name: Balance Report
tools.desc: Monte-Carlo win-rate report comparing pre/post per Act with chart.js. Runs from balance-snapshot.cjs output.

tools.name: BG Remove
tools.desc: Batch background removal for sprite images using the remove.bg API.

tools.name: Brainstorm
tools.desc: Design brainstorm and planning notes for upcoming milestones.

tools.name: Character Redesign
tools.desc: Submit characters for full SpriteCook redesign pipeline. Reference art + 7 canonical poses.

tools.name: Character Redesign Archive
tools.desc: Snapshot history of the per-class re-designs (M217-era anchors). Read-only reference.

tools.name: Class Catalog
tools.desc: All 28 playable classes — portrait, 7-pose sprite strip, role, armor, primary attribute, full skill list with MP cost + unlock level, and class passive tree. Reads live from data-source.js (same source the in-game screens use).

tools.name: Combat Replay
tools.desc: Replay logged combats turn-by-turn. Useful for debugging skill ordering and damage roll edge cases.

tools.name: Companion Catalog
tools.desc: All companions — class pets, hireables, wild companions, and dragon companions. Sortable table with stat columns.

tools.name: Custom Content
tools.desc: Author custom mod content via the JSON DSL — enemies, items, quests.

tools.name: Data Catalogs (Legacy)
tools.desc: Old combined catalog landing page. Superseded by per-category catalog pages.

tools.name: Data Overrides
tools.desc: Upload custom JSON to override any catalog data type. Overrides persist via localStorage.

tools.name: Documentation
tools.desc: Design and reference docs — image policy, schema reference, mod authoring.

tools.name: Dungeon Catalog
tools.desc: Side-branch dungeons: name, zone, stages, mini-boss, rewards. Card grid with click-to-expand.

tools.name: Enemy Catalog
tools.desc: All enemies by act — stats, loot tables, status-on-hit effects.

tools.name: Image Review V2
tools.desc: Unified image catalog + pending-review queue. Replaces image-review.html and character-redesign.html.

tools.name: Images
tools.desc: (no description — add one in tools-meta.json)

tools.name: Infinite Dungeon Catalog
tools.desc: Reference for the procedurally-generated post-game dungeon — floor scaling, modifiers, reward curves.

tools.name: Item Catalog
tools.desc: All weapon and armor bases with stat ranges, categories, and affix eligibility.

tools.name: Milestones
tools.desc: (no description — add one in tools-meta.json)

tools.name: Mod System Report
tools.desc: Status of the mod authoring pipeline — supported ops, known limits, shelf items.

tools.name: News Archive
tools.desc: Index of all milestone reports / dev news posts.

tools.name: Rebalance
tools.desc: Interactive balance sliders — adjust enemy and loot multipliers, preview changes.

tools.name: Rebalance Diff
tools.desc: Diff viewer for the M205 rebalance arc — before/after enemy stats, hero curves, item drops.

tools.name: Rebalance Report
tools.desc: Auto-generated balance analysis report comparing milestones.

tools.name: Roadmap
tools.desc: Milestone roadmap — completed and upcoming milestones.

tools.name: Skill Audit
tools.desc: Audit class skills — mpCost, damage multipliers, talent coverage, missing descriptions.

tools.name: Skill Interaction Simulator
tools.desc: Run hypothetical skill rotations against a dummy target to see damage/heal output and status interactions.

tools.name: Spell Catalog
tools.desc: All class skills and spells — sorted by class, type, and MP cost.

tools.name: Sprite Adjust
tools.desc: Per-character sprite visual adjustment — offset, scale, flip overrides.

tools.name: Sprite Flip Review
tools.desc: Archived — review sprite horizontal flips. Superseded by Sprite Adjust.

tools.name: Sprite Replace
tools.desc: Upload replacement sprites for characters in bulk.

tools.name: Status Effect Catalog
tools.desc: Full glossary of all status effects with glyph, color, plain-language description. Grouped by category.

tools.name: Status Effect Matrix
tools.desc: Cross-reference of status interactions (e.g. burn + bleed stacking, dazed vs stun mechanics).

tools.name: Wishlist
tools.desc: Feature and bug wishlist organized by milestone target. Track status of every request.

tools.name: Affix Survey (deprecated)
tools.desc: Archived. Superseded by Affix Interaction Matrix.

tools.name: Enemy Audit (deprecated)
tools.desc: Archived. Outdated — use Enemy Catalog instead.

tools.name: Image Review (deprecated)
tools.desc: Archived. Replaced by Image Review V2.

tools.name: Redesign Survey (deprecated)
tools.desc: Archived. Superseded by Image Review V2 character pose grid.
